reviews.review_description: The game is very action packed but I think it’s very hard to play off-line. ￼If you wanna play bot it doesn’t really work and that’s why I give her two stars and also I realise that lots of characters need to buy premium and take like three days so it’s not the best, but they’re so kind of fun

The game is insanely fun, with a very high skill ceiling. There is actually a lot of different skills, mechanics, and strategies involved that all work with different runners (Characters), and finding the right runner and what works is an engaging experience. Once you join the discord, improving and playing with high level players is so much easier. The only issue is that the game and the active community is small, so queuing can take a while, and updates don’t usually add much. PLAY THIS GAME, MAKE IT POPULAR
This was just fun

How have I not seen this game??? Holy fantasy! It's amazing, I love the control, I love the graphics and feel of it.. You definitely have a winner here.

I know it's not thr direction of this game HOWEVER, if this had a single player campaign mode OMG it would literally have everything.

Of course the practice mode is not challenging at all, but I think it's deliberate to let you get used to everything..
I'm actually blow away by how much fun this is and how it makes me feel when I play.
Best game I've played

I come from Brawlhalla. In fact, I dropped that game because it became extremely passive. This game is extremely chaotic, high octane, and blood pumping. I love this game because of how much fun I have in every match. Win or lose, I'm enjoying this game to a crazy extent. If you haven't tried it and you're looking for a game where every match will have you feeling like a superhero, definitely give this game a try. I do feel like the UI could use some work though.

reviews.review_title: Really fun, but it can be better!
reviews.review_description: Real fun game, reminds me of the fighter game from shangri-la frontier!

Edit: the devs responded and said that bots don't have an advantage. They do. They don't have to deal with the netcode, which sucks fat monkey scalp. And there are still no real players and the skins suck and we all got scammed.

This game is played exclusively by people who play IT exclusively. Every lobby, it's just people practically locking onto you and seemingly unaffected by the extreme latency. Are these bots? Are these cheaters? Are these just sweats? We may never know.
Edit: I have learned that these are mostly bots, with some sweats sprinkled in. I would honestly be fine with this, if the bots didn't have 3-5 business days of host advantage.

The game is also one of the first vr games to follow fortnite's lead, with the currencies, skins, battle passes, and all. The skins are mediocre, and the actual gameplay would be kinda nice, if not for the aforementioned sweats. Good idea for a game, I just wish it was more thoughtfulto actually play it.

Now is the part where I mention I bought the game for $20 and got only $20 in in-game currency when they went free to play. That's, like, less than 2 of the "higher value" recolors. And they are just recolors. Whole lotta value, turning my character red instead of blue. 65% of the value, to be exact. That doesn't include the gloves or the weapon.

Private lobbies with friends might go kinda hard, to avoid the sweats, but I don't have those.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! The bots aren't given any actual advantage and there's no host latency, so it's just a gameplay gap you're experiencing that will get better as you do as well. You can also just turn off any Bots in your matchmaking with that option! 

There is a Brazen Blaze Discord where you can find lots of friendly players and enjoy some private lobbies with, so consider checking that out as well!

--- 

Sorry you've made the decision to hate the game regardless of what is happening. I hope you find other games you can enjoy!

I gotta admit, I didn't think much when I saw this game aside from the pretty excellent art style but once I actually got in, this is easily one of my favorite arena fighters.

You're certainly gonna need the stomach for flying around spaces but once you get the hang of the excellent movement and find a character that suits your playstyle, it's seriously a lot of fun. The game has crossplay with Steam users so finding a match has been an easy and relatively quick affair, even at 2am EST.

This game scratches that Gundam Extreme VS itch for me in the best ways. I'm still a complete newb to the game but I can easily see myself grinding away to unlock everyone. Definitely give this a shot.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and we're glad to hear you're having fun! Every runner plays differently so there's definitely a lot to look forward to!

reviews.review_title: Very well made but one downside
reviews.review_description: Its a really well made game but my battery drains quickly while playing it
Super fun game very dynamic and a great community. Play brazen blaze it's free!
I don't know what else to say. This game is just epic! And so interactive too!

First of all, thanks for making this game free to play. It really helps a LOT to keep VR multiplayer games from dying prematurely.
Second, this is my favorite multiplayer VR game so far. I love the fighting and movement style.
The only thing I’d like to see improved is the resolution on the Quest 3 to make things look a bit more sharp— but other than that, the game is 🔥.
Keep up the great work! I’ll recommend this game to anyone looking for something fun to play.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and feedback, we're happy to hear you're enjoying the game! We appreciate your support and hope you and any friends are able to enjoy Brazen together!

reviews.review_description: IM HAVING THE TIME OF MY LIFE IN FREE FOR ALL MODE

Clips of the game doesn’t do it justice it’s a amazing game and you get to punch people to space. It also has many different runners allowing to game to be different every time so go ahead and get it  already it’s worth the storage.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and we're glad to hear our game has had such a great impact on you!!

reviews.review_description: Good game

After a day or 2, the game started to work again. Support was super helpful, but I didn't even need them. I love this game. My only problem is that the matchmaking can be a bit unbalanced. There are times where I have to carry my entire team because they can't get a kill. But other than that, great game!

developer_response.body: We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game! We appreciate your feedback about matchmaking and will continue working to make battles as balanced as possible. Thanks for playing Brazen Blaze!

reviews.review_title: Best hero shooter I’ve played in so long
reviews.review_description: I love this game because it has a super replayable game loop and there’s a charector for everyone, and I mean EVERYONE. The rotating game modes is a really fun mechanism too. The only gripe I have with this game like most hero shooters is that all the good skins are locked behind a paywall but that’s no reason to not play this game so give it a try.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and we're happy to hear you're enjoying the game! Thank you for the feedback regarding pricing as well, it's a sensitive topic so I appreciate hearing user's thoughts on it directly.
